name: Thunes
description: Thunes — Global cross-border payment network connecting 130+ countries via mobile money, bank transfers, and wallets for B2B payouts.

seo.title: Thunes — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Thunes: Thunes — Global cross-border payment network connecting 130+ countries via mobile money, bank transfers, and wallets for B2B payouts.

when_to_use: B2B cross-border payouts to mobile wallets in 130+ countries
Remittance network payouts across mobile money in Africa and Asia
Multi-corridor payout routing for gig platform disbursements

pros: Mobile money, wallets, and bank rails unified
cons: Less focus on consumer payment acceptance
review.verdict: Best-in-class global B2B payout network when you need mobile money and emerging market rails under one API.
review.best_for: Platforms needing cross-border B2B payouts into emerging markets via wallets and mobile money
review.not_for: Small merchants wanting card acceptance or self-serve signup
